queries.label: Graph stress test: Incumbent platforms are the distribution channel
queries.query: "AI agent" (channel OR distribution OR incumbent OR platforms) (failed OR delayed OR slower OR risk OR cost OR breach OR regulation)

queries.label: Graph stress test: Scaled agent adoption concentrates in bounded service operations
queries.query: "AI agent" (adoption OR bounded OR concentrates OR operations OR scaled OR service) (failed OR delayed OR slower OR risk OR cost OR breach OR regulation)

queries.label: Graph stress test: Agent payments are moving from protocol to production
queries.query: "AI agent" (payments OR production OR protocol) (failed OR delayed OR slower OR risk OR cost OR breach OR regulation)

queries.label: Graph gap: SuccessKPI brings WEM to Webex Contact Center (announcement -> evidence)
queries.query: ("Cisco Webex" OR "SuccessKPI") "AI agent" (pilot OR production OR deployed OR live OR customer OR customers OR outcomes OR quality)

open_questions: Which named customers are live, and at what interaction volume
What changes in resolution, quality, staffing, and customer outcomes are measured

queries.label: Graph gap: Tenon expands on ServiceNow AI Platform (announcement -> evidence)
queries.query: ("ServiceNow" OR "Tenon") "AI agent" (pilot OR production OR deployed OR live OR customer OR conversion OR cost OR outcomes)

open_questions: Which workflows operate autonomously and which remain human-triggered
What are the conversion, launch-time, review, and cost outcomes

queries.label: Graph gap: FIS and Anthropic develop financial-crimes agent (pilot -> evidence)
queries.query: ("Anthropic" OR "FIS") "AI agent" (production OR rollout OR usage OR volume OR customer OR outcomes OR quality)

open_questions: Have BMO or Amalgamated Bank moved the agent into live operations, and at what investigation volume
What are the measured false-positive, review-time, quality, and escalation outcomes relative to the claimed targets

queries.label: Graph stress test: Agent-originated traffic is becoming an addressable market
queries.query: "AI agent" (addressable OR market OR originated OR traffic) (failed OR delayed OR slower OR risk OR cost OR breach OR regulation)

queries.label: Graph stress test: Trust infrastructure monetizes before full autonomy
queries.query: "AI agent" (autonomy OR infrastructure OR monetizes OR trust) (failed OR delayed OR slower OR risk OR cost OR breach OR regulation)

queries.label: Graph gap: BBVA and Visa complete agent-initiated payment (production -> evidence)
queries.query: ("BBVA" OR "Visa") "AI agent" (scaled OR volume OR transactions OR revenue OR customers OR active OR merchants)

open_questions: How many transactions followed, across how many active agents and merchants
What authorization, dispute, and exception mechanisms were used

queries.label: Graph gap: NatWest reports higher autonomous Cora resolution (production -> evidence)
queries.query: ("NatWest Group") "AI agent" (scaled OR volume OR transactions OR revenue OR customers OR correction OR cost)

open_questions: What absolute query volume and query mix underlie the 20-percentage-point improvement
How much of the improvement comes from the GenAI system rather than journey redesign or routing
What are correction, escalation, customer-outcome, control, and unit-cost measures

queries.label: Graph gap: R1 pilots agentic revenue-cycle calls (pilot -> evidence)
queries.query: ("R1 RCM" OR "Sierra AI") "AI agent" (production OR rollout OR usage OR volume OR customer OR approval OR correction)

open_questions: How many calls now complete autonomously, including payment or plan setup
What are the human-escalation, correction, reversal, privacy-incident, and patient-outcome rates
Which actions require approval and how are agent identities and permissions audited across connected systems

queries.label: Graph gap: C Spire scales agent email triage (scaled -> evidence)
queries.query: ("C Spire" OR "ServiceNow") "AI agent" (growth OR revenue OR retention OR margin OR regulation OR approval OR correction OR error)

open_questions: What share of cases is fully resolved rather than classified or routed
What are the error, correction, escalation, and later-rework rates
How were permissions, incident thresholds, and human approval rules configured
